project: CICD Stats Watcher Future Task Plan
status_note: All tasks are marked completed_task:false because implementation has not started yet.

tasks.title: Add workflow auto-detection
tasks.summary: Auto-detect workflow files instead of depending on a hardcoded CI.yml path.

tasks.title: Create richer YAML step extractor
tasks.summary: Extend workflow extraction so each GitHub Actions step includes enough structured data for hotspot analysis.

tasks.title: Build rule-based hotspot scorer
tasks.summary: Create a heuristic engine that classifies steps as likely CPU, RAM, or storage hotspots using command patterns.

tasks.title: Add script content resolver
tasks.summary: Resolve referenced scripts such as sh ./build.sh and inspect their contents to improve hotspot scoring.

tasks.title: Create predict_hotspots.py CLI
tasks.summary: Expose extraction and scoring through a single command-line entry point.

tasks.title: Generate watcher manifest automatically
tasks.summary: Generate watcher-manifest.yaml from hotspot predictions instead of maintaining it manually.

tasks.title: Update validation for generated manifests
tasks.summary: Ensure generated manifests are validated cleanly against extracted workflow inventory.

tasks.title: Integrate hotspot prediction into CI bootstrap
tasks.summary: Run inventory extraction, prediction, manifest generation, and validation during workflow setup.

tasks.title: Update run_tracked_step.sh to consume generated tracking decisions
tasks.summary: Make the tracked-step wrapper rely on generated manifest or prediction outputs instead of only hand-edited config.

tasks.title: Add adaptive polling for hotspot steps
tasks.summary: Use higher-resolution monitoring for predicted hotspot steps and lower-resolution monitoring for routine steps.

tasks.title: Reduce repeated workflow wrapper usage
tasks.summary: Standardize wrapper usage through a cleaner reusable integration pattern such as a composite action or helper convention.

tasks.title: Add a generic delta tracker utility
tasks.summary: Create a reusable delta-tracking base for CPU, Docker, and disk telemetry.

tasks.title: Implement CPU delta tracking
tasks.summary: Collect proper CPU deltas inspired by Beszel instead of relying only on coarse shell snapshots.

tasks.title: Implement disk I/O delta tracking
tasks.summary: Track disk throughput and I/O changes during monitored CI steps.

tasks.title: Implement Docker stats collection
tasks.summary: Capture per-container Docker resource usage through a direct Docker API or socket-based collector.

tasks.title: Update mark_step.sh to use enhanced telemetry
tasks.summary: Integrate the new telemetry collectors into step boundary snapshots.

tasks.title: Validate telemetry against real runs
tasks.summary: Compare collected step-level telemetry against expected runner behavior and tune the collection logic.

tasks.title: Add full-tracking data collection mode
tasks.summary: Temporarily enable tracking for all steps so the system can collect labeled examples.

tasks.title: Build training-data extractor
tasks.summary: Convert watcher outputs into training records such as step text and measured CPU, RAM, and storage deltas.

tasks.title: Add prediction-versus-actual evaluation reporting
tasks.summary: Measure how well heuristic predictions match collected telemetry from real runs.

tasks.title: Build synthetic data generator
tasks.summary: Generate synthetic CI command samples with approximate labels to supplement real data.

tasks.title: Optionally add public workflow scraper
tasks.summary: Collect public workflow structures for broader coverage and tokenization input.

tasks.title: Train a tokenizer on CI command text
tasks.summary: Build a compact tokenizer vocabulary tailored to CI command patterns.

tasks.title: Define the 1D-CNN model architecture
tasks.summary: Create the small hotspot prediction model inspired by the lightweight Magika philosophy.

tasks.title: Build the training loop
tasks.summary: Train the model using mixed real and synthetic data with regression outputs for CPU, RAM, and storage scores.

tasks.title: Calibrate hotspot thresholds
tasks.summary: Tune classification thresholds so hotspot predictions balance precision and recall well enough for CI usage.

tasks.title: Quantize the model and export to ONNX
tasks.summary: Shrink the trained model and package it for fast CPU-only inference.

tasks.title: Build the ONNX inference wrapper
tasks.summary: Load the exported model, tokenize step inputs, run inference, and expose predictions to the watcher.

tasks.title: Add hybrid scoring with rules fallback
tasks.summary: Use AI predictions when confident and fall back to rules when the model is unavailable or uncertain.

tasks.title: Package the tool for one-command adoption
tasks.summary: Create an installable or easy-to-bootstrap distribution flow for new repositories.

tasks.title: Add Docker packaging for CI integration
tasks.summary: Ship the scanner and runtime in a minimal container image for repeatable CI usage.

tasks.title: Add GitLab CI support
tasks.summary: Support another CI syntax and structure while reusing the hotspot prediction pipeline.

tasks.title: Add override support for generated manifests
tasks.summary: Allow repos to keep generated tracking defaults but layer human exceptions on top.

tasks.title: Build telemetry feedback collection
tasks.summary: Append step text and measured outcomes from real CI runs into a reusable training dataset.

tasks.title: Add automated retraining
tasks.summary: Periodically retrain the model on accumulated telemetry and validate before updating the deployed model.

tasks.title: Add model versioning and promotion logic
tasks.summary: Keep multiple model versions, compare them, and promote better-performing models safely.

tasks.title: Add A/B comparison of models on real workflows
tasks.summary: Evaluate competing model versions against live workflow behavior before rolling them out broadly.
